news.t: BMO Announces Upcoming Reverse Splits of Six Series of its Exchange Traded Notes (NYSE Arca: BERZ, BNKD, DULL, FLYD, NRGD and OILD)
MicroSectors™ Launches U.S. Travel Long & Short Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: FLYD is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Uber Technologies stock at 10.66%, Booking Holdings at 10.35%, The Walt Disney Company at 7.56%, American Airlines Group at 6.91%, and United Airlines Holdings at 5.55%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Travel - 3x Inverse Leveraged ETN (FLYD) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the MerQube MicroSectors U.S. Travel index. The fund tracks 300% inverse of the daily price movements of a liquidity-weighted index of US-listed travel-related companies. FLYD was launched on Jun 24, 2022 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
